commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds bounded path-mismatch retries for imported memory-wiki source page writes and coalesces concurrent bridge source syncs for the same vault/config.

PR surface: Source +82, Tests +104. Total +186 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: fs-safe can throw path-mismatch after an atomic write, and the PR retry then recomputes existing content after the write and can report changed:false. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve retry result accounting and add the missing regression assertion without changing the broader memory-wiki product direction.

target.title: Harden memory wiki bridge imports
target.body:
## Summary

- Add bounded retry handling for transient `FsSafeError: path-mismatch` while writing imported memory-wiki source pages.
- Coalesce concurrent bridge source syncs for the same vault/config so repeated `wiki.palace` / `wiki.importInsights`-style callers share one in-flight import pass.
- Preserve existing vault safety boundaries for symlink/path-alias and directory collision cases.

Related to #91154.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Local memory-wiki bridge imports no longer run duplicate bridge artifact listings/imports for concurrent callers of the same vault/config, and imported source page writes retry transient fs-safe `path-mismatch` without weakening existing symlink/path safety checks.

**Environment tested:** Linux worktree at `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154`, Node 22.22.0, pnpm 11.2.2. Verification used local filesystem-backed memory-wiki vault/workspace fixtures only; no external channel credentials or live Feishu/Slack/IRC transport were used.

**Command run after the patch:**

```bash
PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154 exec vitest run extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.test.ts
PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154 exec oxlint extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.test.ts
PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false corepack pnpm@11.2.2 --dir /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154 exec tsx /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-91154-evidence/memory-wiki-bridge-local-proof.mjs
```

**Evidence after fix:**

```text
RUN  v4.1.7 /media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-91154

Test Files  2 passed (2)
     Tests  13 passed (13)
  Start at  12:01:45
  Duration  6.79s
```

```json
{
  "behavior": "memory-wiki bridge import local proof",
  "concurrentBridgeListings": 1,
  "settledBridgeListings": 2,
  "totalBridgeListingsAfterSafetyCheck": 3,
  "initialImportedCount": 1,
  "initialIngestLogCount": 1,
  "settledRerunSkippedCount": 1,
  "symlinkRefused": true,
  "symlinkTargetPreserved": true,
  "vaultDir": "/tmp/openclaw-91154-proof-WE7VVn/vault",
  "workspaceDir": "/tmp/openclaw-91154-proof-WE7VVn/workspace",
  "script": "/media/vdb/migrated-from-root-media-vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-91154-evidence/memory-wiki-bridge-local-proof.mjs"
}
```

```text
oxlint completed with no findings for:
- extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.ts
- extensions/memory-wiki/src/source-page-shared.test.ts
- extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.ts
- extensions/memory-wiki/src/bridge.test.ts
```

**Observed result after fix:** Concurrent local bridge sync callers shared a single in-flight import pass (`concurrentBridgeListings: 1`) and still returned the imported bridge page. A settled follow-up sync performed a fresh listing and skipped the unchanged page. The production-path proof also replaced the imported page with a vault symlink and confirmed the sync was refused while the symlink target remained unchanged. The focused regression test covers the transient `path-mismatch` retry path and confirms the imported page body plus sync state are written after retry.

**What was not tested:** This does not claim a full #91154 product-policy resolution. It does not test live Feishu/Slack/IRC or any other non-local channel transport, RSS import spirals, broader batching/backpressure policy, partial-failure product behavior, or maintainer-only load environments. Full-repo `tsc --noEmit --pretty false` was attempted but the local process was terminated by the environment after heap/OOM pressure, so the passing checks here are the focused Vitest, targeted oxlint, and local production-path proof above.
target.author: mushuiyu886

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
